016package edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.dao;
017
018import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData;
019import androidx.room.Dao;
020import androidx.room.Delete;
021import androidx.room.Insert;
022import androidx.room.Query;
023import androidx.room.Update;
024import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.UserProfile;
025import java.util.List;
026
027/**
028 * Data Access Object interface for {@link UserProfile} entity. Provides methods for managing user
029 * profile data including scanner item inventory.
030 */
031@Dao
032public interface UserProfileDao {
033
034  /**
035   * Inserts a new user profile into the database.
036   *
037   * @param userProfile User profile to insert.
038   * @return Generated primary key ID.
039   */
040  @Insert
041  long insert(UserProfile userProfile);
042
043  /**
044   * Retrieves all user profiles from the database as observable live data.
045   *
046   * @return LiveData containing list of all user profiles.
047   */
048  @Query("SELECT * FROM user_profile ORDER BY user_profile_id")
049  LiveData<List<UserProfile>> selectAll();
050  // TODO: 3/16/2026 review claude's decisions. is this useful? er,,, maybe if I have a pulldown of users? I'm not even sure I want more than 1....
051
052  /**
053   * Retrieves a single user profile by its primary key as observable live data.
054   *
055   * @param id User profile ID.
056   * @return LiveData containing the user profile with the specified ID.
057   */
058  @Query("SELECT * FROM user_profile WHERE user_profile_id = :id")
059  LiveData<UserProfile> selectById(long id);
060  // TODO: 3/16/2026 review claude's decisions. Is this what I need for displaying the number of scanners in a UI? yeah, probably.
061
062  /**
063   * Retrieves a single user profile by its OAuth key (for Google sign-in).
064   *
065   * @param oauthKey OAuth key.
066   * @return User profile with the specified OAuth key, or {@code null} if not found.
067   */
068  @Query("SELECT * FROM user_profile WHERE oauth_key = :oauthKey")
069  UserProfile selectByOauthKey(String oauthKey);
070
071
072  @Query("SELECT * FROM user_profile WHERE oauth_key = :oauthKey")
073  LiveData<UserProfile> selectLiveByOauthKey(String oauthKey);
074
075  /**
076   * Retrieves a single user profile by its primary key (non-LiveData version).
077   *
078   * @param id User profile ID.
079   * @return User profile with the specified ID, or {@code null} if not found.
080   */
081  @Query("SELECT * FROM user_profile WHERE user_profile_id = :id")
082  UserProfile selectByIdSync(long id);
083
084  /**
085   * Retrieves the scanner item count for a specific user as observable live data.
086   *
087   * @param id User profile ID.
088   * @return LiveData containing the scanner item count.
089   */
090  @Query("SELECT scanner_items FROM user_profile WHERE user_profile_id = :id")
091  LiveData<Integer> selectScannerCountById(long id);
092
093  /**
094   * Updates an existing user profile, typically used for scanner item inventory changes.
095   *
096   * @param userProfile User profile to update.
097   * @return Number of rows updated (should be 1).
098   */
099  @Update
100  int update(UserProfile userProfile);
101  // Could/Should I make increment/decrement methods for scanner items? by user?
102
103  /**
104   * Updates the scanner item count for a specific user.
105   *
106   * @param id User profile ID.
107   * @param scannerItems New scanner item count.
108   * @return Number of rows updated (should be 1).
109   */
110  @Query("UPDATE user_profile SET scanner_items = :scannerItems WHERE user_profile_id = :id")
111  int updateScannerItems(long id, int scannerItems);
112
113  /**
114   * Deletes a user profile from the database.
115   *
116   * @param userProfile User profile to delete.
117   * @return Number of rows deleted (should be 1).
118   */
119  @Delete
120  int delete(UserProfile userProfile);
121
122}
